intro:
A date difference calculator tells you exactly how many days, weeks, months, and years are between two dates. Whether you are calculating how long until a vacation, how many days since an anniversary, how old a project is, or the duration of a contract, this tool gives you the precise answer instantly.

Manually counting calendar days between dates is tedious and error-prone, especially across month boundaries, leap years, and year changes. Our free date difference calculator handles all the complexity automatically, accounting for months of different lengths, leap years, and any date range you specify.

From project managers tracking deadlines to couples counting days since they met, the date difference calculator is a universally useful tool. It works for dates in the past, present, or future, covering any span from a single day to decades.
howItWorks: Select or enter the start date and end date. Click Calculate and the tool computes the exact difference in days, weeks, months, and years. It also shows the breakdown in multiple units so you can express the duration in whichever format is most meaningful for your purpose.
interpretationGuide: The result shows the total days between the two dates, plus the human-friendly breakdown in years, months, and remaining days. The week count rounds down to complete weeks. Use the format most appropriate for your context — days for short durations, months or years for longer ones.

faqs.question: How do I calculate the number of days between two dates?
faqs.answer: Enter both dates into the calculator and click Calculate. The tool subtracts the earlier date from the later one, accounting for varying month lengths and leap years to give the exact number of days.

faqs.question: Does the calculator account for leap years?
faqs.answer: Yes. The calculator correctly handles leap years (years divisible by 4, except century years not divisible by 400). February 29th is a valid date in leap years and the extra day is counted correctly.

faqs.question: Can I calculate dates in the past?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can calculate differences between any two historical dates. Enter dates from any year and the calculator handles the full range of the Gregorian calendar.

faqs.question: Can I calculate how many days until a future event?
faqs.answer: Yes. Set the start date to today and the end date to the future event. The result shows exactly how many days, weeks, and months remain until that date.

faqs.question: How many days is a year?
faqs.answer: A regular year has 365 days. A leap year has 366 days. On average, a year is 365.25 days, which is why we add a leap day every 4 years to keep the calendar aligned with Earth's orbit.

faqs.question: How do I calculate someone's age in days?
faqs.answer: Set the start date to the person's birth date and the end date to today. The total days result is their exact age in days. Our Age Calculator also provides this along with years, months, and days.

faqs.question: What is the difference between calendar days and business days?
faqs.answer: Calendar days count every day including weekends and holidays. Business days only count weekdays (Monday through Friday), excluding weekends and public holidays. This calculator counts calendar days.

faqs.question: How many weeks is 90 days?
faqs.answer: 90 days is exactly 12 weeks and 6 days, or approximately 12.86 weeks. Three months is approximately 91 days depending on which months are involved, as months range from 28 to 31 days.

faqs.question: Can I calculate contract or lease durations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Enter the contract start date and end date to get the exact duration in days, weeks, and months. This is useful for verifying lease terms, contract periods, and subscription durations.

faqs.question: How accurate is the date difference calculation?
faqs.answer: The calculation is exact to the day. It uses the Gregorian calendar standard, correctly handles all month lengths, leap years, and any date range. The result is the precise number of days between the two dates.
